Container.Name: botmem
Container.Overview: Personal memory system that ingests events from multiple data sources (emails, messages, photos, locations), normalizes them into a unified memory schema, and provides cross-modal retrieval with weighted ranking. Local-first, privacy-focused — your data stays on your server.[br][br]Requires PostgreSQL, Redis, and Typesense containers (auto-configured via this template's companion docker-compose, or point to existing instances).[br][br][b]Quick start:[/b] Install this container, then configure DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, and TYPESENSE_URL to point to your existing services or use the companion stack.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: memory rag personal ai search email messages photos recall knowledge base vector
Container.Requires: PostgreSQL 16+, Redis 7+, Typesense 27+. Install these from Community Applications first, or use the companion docker-compose.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Botmem web interface and API port.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent data directory (connector session files, caches).

Config.Name: Plugins Directory
Config.Description: External plugin directory (optional).

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Point to your PostgreSQL container or external instance.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Redis connection string for BullMQ job queues. Point to your Redis container.

Config.Name: Typesense URL
Config.Description: Typesense search engine URL. Point to your Typesense container.

Config.Name: Typesense API Key
Config.Description: API key for Typesense. Must match the key configured in your Typesense container.

Config.Name: App Secret
Config.Description: AES-256-GCM encryption key for credentials at rest. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: JWT Access Secret
Config.Description: Secret for signing JWT access tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: JWT Refresh Secret
Config.Description: Secret for signing JWT refresh tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: AI Backend
Config.Description: AI inference backend: 'ollama' (local/remote) or 'openrouter' (cloud API).

Config.Name: Ollama Base URL
Config.Description: Ollama inference endpoint. Point to your Ollama container or remote host.

Config.Name: Ollama Username
Config.Description: Basic auth username for Ollama (optional, for remote Ollama behind auth proxy).

Config.Name: Ollama Password
Config.Description: Basic auth password for Ollama (optional).

Config.Name: Ollama Embedding Model
Config.Description: Ollama model for generating embeddings (1024d). Must be pulled in Ollama first.

Config.Name: Ollama Text Model
Config.Description: Ollama model for text enrichment (entity extraction, claims, factuality).

Config.Name: Ollama Vision Model
Config.Description: Ollama vision-language model for photo/image analysis.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenRouter (required if AI_BACKEND=openrouter).

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Enables Typesense conversational RAG search (uses gpt-4.1-nano). Leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: Frontend URL
Config.Description: Public URL for CORS and OAuth redirects. Set to your Unraid IP:port or reverse proxy URL.

Config.Name: Port
Config.Description: Internal API port (should match WebUI port mapping).
